motivation: f4-staleness-v1 (vs the OLD sigma-50 incumbent) showed a monotone dev trend toward the MDE (-0.0004/-0.0008/-0.0015 at 25/50/100) without crossing it. Re-tested against the adopted incumbent_v1 (sigma 85) with a wider grid.
disclosure: The v1 family results above were DEV-split observations only; the rotated holdout (events >= 2026-01-01 per harness_v1) has never been touched by any staleness variant. The 46 events burned for the sigma-85 adoption are now dev events by design (spec 5.3 rotation).
protocol: Dev screening via run_replay (v1 defaults); select_nominee; holdout confirmation only on an explicit go.
